caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He wears glasses, over-ear headphones, and a tall, pointed grey wig. He is positioned in front of a microphone, with a background featuring several framed pictures and clothing items. To his left, a logo reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and to his right, text reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". In the beginning, the man is gesturing with his right hand near his head while looking slightly to the side. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hand and begins to speak, shifting his gaze forward and slightly to the left. He remains in the same seated position throughout the sequence, with the studio equipment and background remaining static.
